ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type" INTEGER /* Type of school (e.g., District, Charter) */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled in the school */,
  "total_budget" TEXT /* Total budget allocated to the school */,
  "per_student_budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated per student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the school */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the school is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the school's website */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  "principal_email" TEXT /* Email address of the school principal */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the school was enrolled in the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the school information was updated */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district to which the school belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_school_type FOREIGN KEY ("school_type") REFERENCES school_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school for which the performance metrics are recorded */,
  "average_math_score" TEXT /* Average math score of students in the school */,
  "average_reading_score" TEXT /* Average reading score of students in the school */,
  "percent_passing_math" TEXT /* Percentage of students passing math */,
  "percent_passing_reading" TEXT /* Percentage of students passing reading */,
  "overall_pass_rate" TEXT /* Overall pass rate (average of math and reading pass rates) */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year for which the academic performance is recorded */,
  "number_of_students_tested_math" INTEGER /* Number of students who took the math test */,
  "number_of_students_tested_reading" INTEGER /* Number of students who took the reading test */,
  "average_science_score" TEXT /* Average science score of students in the school */,
  "percent_passing_science" TEXT /* Percentage of students passing science */,
  "overall_pass_rate_combined" TEXT /* Combined overall pass rate (average of math, reading, and science pass rates) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_performance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_allocation" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school for which the budget is allocated */,
  "total_budget" TEXT /* Total budget allocated to the school */,
  "per_student_budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated per student */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year for which the budget is allocated */,
  "salaries_budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for salaries */,
  "facilities_budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for facilities */,
  "materials_budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for materials */,
  "technology_budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for technology */,
  "other_expenses_budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for other expenses */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Sources of funding (e.g., state, federal, local) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_allocation_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the school type (e.g., District, Charter) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, school admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Whether the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the system */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the district */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the district */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the district is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the district is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the district */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the district */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the district's website */,
  "superintendent_name" TEXT /* Name of the district superintendent */,
  "superintendent_email" TEXT /* Email address of the district superintendent */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the district was enrolled in the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the district information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)
